text: In the first image, I find myself just outside a conference or seminar room. The scene is in transition: a few people in the room, some setting up or arranging technical equipment, rows of empty chairs awaiting an audience. There is an air of anticipation and preparedness, yet a curious quiet—an interlude before collective focus and discourse take shape. I sense potential energy, the quiet before the start, and I wonder about the interplay between the collective and the individual in spaces such as these.
